^2 = GameID: BLUS30161
^3 = NAME: ETERNAL SONATA
^5 = APCRED: By krustytoe
^4 = FILE: SAVEDATA
+Green: Notes:to Make Codes Work Read Below
+Load Save (example Slot#1)
+Save On Different Slot (example Slot#2)
+Copy To Usb
+Mod And Copy Back To Ps3
+Load Game.
+Green: Notes:to Make Codes Work Read Above
+Max Money
